title: Automated Detection of Overlapping Assignments and Scheduling Violations
description: The system shall automatically detect overlapping assignments or violations of the 3-minute gap rule and flag scheduling conflicts.
rationale: To prevent operational errors caused by flight schedule conflicts, ensuring safety and efficiency in operations.
business_value: Improves operational accuracy and reduces potential for human error, leading to safer and more efficient airline operations.

source.description: As a system monitor I need the system to automatically detect overlapping assignments or violations of the 3-minute gap rule So that scheduling conflicts can be flagged

acceptance_criteria: Given two flights occupy overlapping time windows, When the system is monitoring, Then alerts are triggered
Given the gap between two slots is less than 3 minutes, When the system is monitoring, Then alerts are triggered
Given a scheduling violation is detected, When the system is monitoring, Then a visual/notification indicator of the violation is shown
preconditions: The system must be operational and running in real-time mode.
Flight assignments and time slots must be inputted into the system.
postconditions: Alerts must be triggered for any detected overlapping assignments or scheduling violations.
A visual/notification indicator must be displayed to indicate a scheduling violation.
functional_constraints: The detection of overlapping assignments and scheduling violations must occur within 1 minute of the time slot changes.
Alerts must be generated in a clear and understandable format, including timestamps and relevant flight information.

non_functional_requirements.performance: The system must handle up to 500 simultaneous flight assignments without significant delay or loss of data.
non_functional_requirements.availability: The system must be available 99.9% of the time, with no more than 1 minute downtime per year.
non_functional_requirements.scalability: The system must be able to scale to accommodate an increase in flight assignments by 50% without performance degradation.
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages and alerts must be user-friendly and easy to interpret.

edge_cases: Two flights with zero-minute gaps between their end and start times.
Overlapping assignments that occur at the exact minute boundary.
Scheduling violations during a time zone change.
System performance under heavy load due to numerous simultaneous flight assignments.
dependencies: Real-time data input from flight management systems.
Alert notification system for visual and auditory alerts.
Logging and auditing system for tracking detected violations.

interfaces.name: Flight Data API
interfaces.description: Interface for receiving real-time flight assignment data from the flight management system.

interfaces.name: Scheduling Database
interfaces.description: Interface for accessing and updating the database of scheduled flight assignments.

interfaces.name: Alert UI
interfaces.description: Interface for displaying visual and auditory alerts to the system monitor.

test_cases.description: Two flights occupy overlapping time windows.
test_cases.expected_result: System triggers an alert for each overlapping assignment.

test_cases.description: Gap between two slots is less than 3 minutes.
test_cases.expected_result: System triggers an alert indicating the scheduling violation.

test_cases.description: System performance under heavy load due to numerous simultaneous flight assignments.
test_cases.expected_result: System handles up to 500 simultaneous flight assignments without significant delay or loss of data.
